analysis:
Based on your framework analysis:

**No qualifying CSPs**: NVDA's IVP at 33% is below your 30%+ threshold for premium selling.

**Best Position Income CC**: AMZN 270 strike, 2026-06-18, 48 DTE, $7.40/$7.55 bid/ask, 0.39 delta, 21.9% annualized return on your overweight position.

**No qualifying LEAPS**: All candidates failing on timing - NVDA/MSFT showing "WAIT" signals due to falling/low patterns, while AAPL/AMZN/IBKR have expensive IVP (55-64%) near highs.

**No Bull Call Spreads available**.

**IVP Environment**: Mixed volatility with tech names elevated (AAPL 60%, AMZN 55%, MSFT 84%) while NVDA compressed at 33% - better suited for covered calls on existing positions than new premium selling.

The market setup favors harvesting premium from your overweight positions rather than establishing new trades, with only AMZN's covered call meeting your quality and return thresholds.
